case_title: SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART RENTAL GALLERY VS TURNQUIST KATHLEEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $729.00 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO MUSEUM OF MODERN ART RENTAL GALLERY AS TO DEFENDANT TURNQUIST KATHLEEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT TURNQUIST KATHLEEN
